label: song-long intensity build: ctrl_build scalar (quadratic ease-in over Songlength) multiplied into the React terms of sa1.Timescale + ctrl_orbit_speed; 2 Audio dials

operations.parameter: Timescale expr (build scalar injected on Audioceil term)
const0value expr (build scalar injected on Orbitreact term)

notes: Build = 1.0 + Buildamount * (clamp(me.time.seconds/Songlength,0,1))**2 - quadratic ease-in, starts at exactly current tuning (1.0), reaches 1+Buildamount by song end. Multiplied ONLY into the React/ceil terms of the two audio-driven MOTION bindings (swarm churn via sa1.Timescale, light orbit via ctrl_orbit_speed) - Audiofloor/Orbitbase untouched so breakdowns stay quiet all song, only peaks grow. Ember (Emberreact, brightness not motion) deliberately NOT scaled. Songlength=180 is a PLACEHOLDER - set to actual track length during Barstart alignment. me.time.seconds (timeline-locked, export-true). Act 3 caution: Buildamount 0.4 = gentle (ceil 1.0->1.4); keep tight to avoid tipping held-tension into Act 4 discharge.
